lead_before_enrichment.description: # Association of Fundraising Professionals ## AFP ICON 2026: Register Today! AFP ICON is the world’s No. 1 fundraising conference, bringing together over 3,000 fundraising professionals for three dynamic days of learning, networking, and growth. Join us April 26-28 in San Diego for 100+ expert-led sessions and countless opportunities to connect with your community! [ ![AFP logo ](https://afpnet.org/sites/default/files/styles/tile/public/2024-02/AFP-logo-4C-1500x1500_0.png?h=8a7fc05e&itok=Q2t4d6Zn) ### AFP Daily:
